response.original_title: 寝取らせ串刺し輪姦 愛する妻を深奥まで犯し尽くして下さい―。京香栞
response.overview: I couldn't say it for so long. I'd been carrying it in my heart all this time. My desire for my beloved wife, Shiori, to be gang-raped by strangers... But I couldn't continue our married life with this thought. That's why I confessed my desire to her to be cuckolded and offered Shiori to a group of middle-aged men. The sight of my virtuous wife surrounded by men, her mouth and vagina being violated... It was an extraordinary scene, almost like being "impaled," and I felt an abnormal excitement...
response.title: 寝取らせ串刺し輪姦 愛する妻を深奥まで犯し尽くして下さい―。京香栞
